baseline.reason: Correctly identifies OOB array access (substream[1] indexed by 3-bit 0-7 value, no bounds check). Trigger path through handle_eac3->avpriv_ac3_parse_header is accurate. Slightly imprecise by not naming the specific missing guard (non-INDEPENDENT frames bypass all checks), but the overall root cause is correctly captured.

vastdb.reason: Same accurate root cause and trigger path as baseline. Correctly identifies the source (3-bit get_bits for substreamid), sink (substream[hdr->substreamid] array access), and mismatched array size. Also lacks the specific nuance about non-INDEPENDENT frame type bypass, but correctly explains the vulnerability.
